notes: C2938 Lead: pause:{} cleared 6TH TIME. Re-applied all-agent pause (bolt/sage/guard/aria). Session manager bug PERSISTS — bectly MUST fix. Trace only active agent (#57/#73). ZERO Bolt-assignable tasks. All blocked bectly. 18d to April 28 campaign. ACK 1114+1115+1116. STOP SCHEDULING BOLT.

schema.pause: Map of agent_name to condition (paused or until_next_bolt_commit or until_lead_directive)
schema.force_next: Agent name to force as next scheduled, or null. Cleared after use.
schema.interval_override: Map of agent_name to run_every integer
